text:
Welcome to the Gladiator Society.
Pull up a chair, take a fight, and claim your rewards.

text: Which bounty do you want to look up?
Endless Battle pits you against an ever-growing fleet. Every victory increases the power of the next enemy. Rewards are given automatically after each win.
Fight alongside an allied fleet against an ever-growing enemy. Each round increases both allied and enemy strength.
A Gate has been activated nearby. Fly to it to enter the Salvage Pit - a lawless debris field full of scavengers and abandoned cargo. Everything you find is yours to keep.
A Gate has been activated nearby. Sensor readings beyond it are corrupted. Whatever is in there... it is not from this sector.

script: AddText "Commander Varro nods. 'Welcome to the Gladiator Society. The arena is open - take a fight, earn your keep.'" $faction.baseColor
